text:
Folks, it looks like its a topic by mistake=85

I'd fallen in the case, running heavy compilation within a VPS host, =
installed by forces of our domestic (Russian) VPS provider=85. They =
didn't devote and space for swap=85 I didn't check it :(

$ dmesg
pid 79990 (cc1), uid 0, was killed: out of swap space
pid 80141 (cc1), uid 0, was killed: out of swap space
pid 80753 (cc1), uid 0, was killed: out of swap space
=85.

Hope, to be forgiven :)

Stan=
